bird.name: 蓝翅雁
bird.summary: 蓝翅雁（学名：Cyanochen cyanoptera），是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 特征 蓝翅雁体重约1520克，翼长约326.2毫米，嘴峰长约31毫米，喙宽度约16.4毫米，喙厚度约13.3毫米，跗蹠长约56.2毫米，尾长约112.5毫米。蓝翅雁在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在开…

relations.subject: 蓝翅雁
relations.evidence: Its preferred habitat is grasslands close to rivers, freshwater lakes, swamps, freshwater marshes, water storage areas, in high altitude subtropical or tropical shrubland or grassland at 2,500–4,000 m altitude
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 蓝翅雁
relations.evidence: Its preferred habitat is grasslands close to rivers, freshwater lakes, swamps, freshwater marshes, water storage areas, in high altitude subtropical or tropical shrubland or grassland at 2,500–4,000 m altitude
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 蓝翅雁
relations.evidence: Its preferred habitat is grasslands close to rivers, freshwater lakes, swamps, freshwater marshes, water storage areas, in high altitude subtropical or tropical shrubland or grassland at 2,500–4,000 m altitude
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 蓝翅雁
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, trapping for food and possibly drought
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
